name: faq
description: FAQ: questions with a Markdown answer, grouped by category, with an order and published flag. Public GET /faq + admin CRUD. Entries carry a jsonb metadata field for project-specific fields.

inject.text: { href: "/admin/faq", label: (t) => t.faq.nav, icon: CircleHelpIcon, adminOnly: true },

faq: { nav: "FAQ", title_: "FAQ", subtitle: "Frequently asked questions.", add: "Add question", editTitle: "Edit question", question: "Question", answer: "Answer (Markdown)", category: "Category", order: "Order", published: "Published", yes: "Yes", no: "No", edit: "Edit", delete: "Delete", cancel: "Cancel", save: "Save", saving: "Saving…", saved: "Saved", deleted: "Deleted", saveError: "Failed to save", loading: "Loading…", empty: "No questions yet.", total: "{count} questions" },

faq: { nav: "FAQ", title_: "FAQ", subtitle: "자주 묻는 질문.", add: "질문 추가", editTitle: "질문 편집", question: "질문", answer: "답변(마크다운)", category: "분류", order: "순서", published: "공개", yes: "예", no: "아니오", edit: "편집", delete: "삭제", cancel: "취소", save: "저장", saving: "저장 중…", saved: "저장됨", deleted: "삭제됨", saveError: "저장 실패", loading: "불러오는 중…", empty: "질문이 없습니다.", total: "{count}개 질문" },

### faq
- Public `GET /faq` (published, grouped by category); admin CRUD under `/admin/faq`. Answers are Markdown, rendered with the markdown module.
- Extend an entry with project-specific fields via its `metadata` (jsonb) — no migration.

instructions: Create the faq_item table:  npm run migration:run -w <app>-api
Manage questions in the admin UI (/admin/faq).
